name: Potato Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Swiss Cheese (or Cheddar), Finely Grated
recipeInstructions:
Makes 12 standard muffins. Note: I have made these using no sugar and low-fat margarine, and do not notice much difference in the quality.
Preheat oven to 400°F. Butter standard muffin tins.
1. In a large bowl, stir and toss together the flour, potato starch, sugar (if used), baking powder, salt, and thyme.
2. Set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the milk and mashed potatoes, then add the egg, melted butter (or margarine), and cheese, and whisk until well mixed.
4. Add to the combined dry ingredients and stir just until blended.
5. Spoon into the prepared muffin tins, filling each cup about 3/4 full.
6. Bake until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean, 15 to 18 minutes.
7. Cool in the tins for 3 minutes, then remove.
